lines.en: Welcome. Are you here for an eye exam or to pick out glasses?
lines.zh: 欢迎。您是来验光还是来挑眼镜的？

lines.en: Both, actually. I think I need a stronger prescription.
lines.zh: 两者都需要。我觉得我需要更高度数的镜片。

lines.en: Let's start with the eye exam then. Please read the letters on the chart.
lines.zh: 那我们先验光吧。请读出视力表上的字母。

lines.en: E, F, P, T... They're getting a bit blurry now.
Thank you. Your prescription has changed slightly. Let's look at some frames.
lines.zh: 谢谢。您的度数有轻微变化。我们来挑一下镜框吧。

lines.en: I prefer lightweight frames. What do you recommend?
lines.zh: 我喜欢轻一点的镜框。您有什么推荐？

lines.en: These titanium frames are very light and durable.
lines.zh: 这些钛合金镜框很轻而且很耐用。

lines.en: They look nice. Can I try them on?
lines.zh: 看起来不错。我可以试戴一下吗？

lines.en: Of course. They suit your face shape very well.
lines.zh: 当然可以。它们很适合您的脸型。

lines.en: I'll take these. When will they be ready?
lines.zh: 我就要这副了。什么时候能做好？
